title: lomatium cuspidatum
intro: Lomatium cuspidatum, also known as poison bane or fern-leaved lomatium, is a perennial plant native to the western United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being an antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Lomatium cuspidatum include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever and inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Lomatium cuspidatum is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and salves, and is typically taken in small doses to avoid potential side effects.
